3D models can be the medium for viewing various kinds of phenomena: for example, remaining within the structural sphere, deformation of the walls was studied by displacement maps 
computed comparing them to vertical planes. The North, East and South walls were analysed (those with doors). This 
highlighted that on the outside they all bulge by around 5 cm between the second order and the attic level, right underneath the strip without marble cladding, with the metal chain laid inside in 1514.
